# teleport-rs — TypeScript Client Generation

## Generated Files

teleport-rs generates three files into the SvelteKit project:

### `types.ts` — All input/output types from Specta

```typescript
// Auto-generated by teleport-rs. DO NOT EDIT.

export interface User {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  name: string;
  avatar: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface LoginRequest {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

export interface AuthToken {
  token: string;
  expiresIn: number;
}

export interface CreatePostRequest {
  title: string;
  content: string;
  tags: string[];
}

export interface Post {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  authorId: string;
  tags: string[];
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface UpdateUserRequest {
  id: string;
  name?: string;
  avatar?: string;
}
```

### `errors.ts` — Error types and RpcResult

```typescript
// Auto-generated by teleport-rs. DO NOT EDIT.

export type AppError<T = never> =
  | { type: "Unauthorized" }
  | { type: "Forbidden" }
  | { type: "NotFound" }
  | { type: "BadRequest"; message: string }
  | { type: "Internal"; message: string }
  | { type: "RateLimited" }
  | { type: "Detail"; detail: T };

export type TransportError =
  | { type: "NetworkError"; message: string }
  | { type: "SerializationError"; message: string }
  | { type: "Timeout"; message: string }
  | { type: "ServerError"; status: number; body: string };

export type RpcResult<T, E = never> =
  | { ok: true; data: T }
  | { ok: false; error: AppError<E> }
  | { ok: false; transport: TransportError };

// Procedure-specific error aliases
export type LoginError = AppError<LoginErrorDetail>;
export type GetUserError = AppError<GetUserErrorDetail>;
export type GetPostsError = AppError<GetPostsErrorDetail>;
export type CreatePostError = AppError<CreatePostErrorDetail>;

export interface LoginErrorDetail {
  invalidCredentials: boolean;
  accountLocked: boolean;
}

export interface GetUserErrorDetail {
  userNotFound: boolean;
}

export interface GetPostsErrorDetail {
  userHasNoPosts: boolean;
}

export interface CreatePostErrorDetail {
  titleTooShort: boolean;
  contentTooLong: boolean;
}
```

### `client.ts` — Generated RPC functions

```typescript
// Auto-generated by teleport-rs. DO NOT EDIT.

import { rpc } from "@teleport-rs/client";
import type { RpcResult, AppError, TransportError } from "./errors";
import type {
  User,
  LoginRequest,
  AuthToken,
  CreatePostRequest,
  Post,
  UpdateUserRequest,
} from "./types";
import type {
  LoginError,
  GetUserError,
  GetPostsError,
  CreatePostError,
  UpdateUserError,
} from "./errors";

export const auth = {
  /**
   * Authenticate a user and receive an access token
   * POST /rpc/auth.login
   */
  login: (
    input: LoginRequest,
  ): Promise<RpcResult<AuthToken, LoginErrorDetail>> =>
    rpc("POST", "/rpc/auth.login", input),

  /**
   * Logout the current user
   * POST /rpc/auth.logout
   */
  logout: (): Promise<RpcResult<void, never>> =>
    rpc("POST", "/rpc/auth.logout", undefined),
};

export const users = {
  /**
   * Get a user by ID
   * GET /rpc/users.getUser
   */
  getUser: (id: string): Promise<RpcResult<User, GetUserErrorDetail>> =>
    rpc("GET", "/rpc/users.getUser", { id }),

  /**
   * Update a user's profile
   * POST /rpc/users.updateUser
   */
  updateUser: (
    input: UpdateUserRequest,
  ): Promise<RpcResult<User, UpdateUserErrorDetail>> =>
    rpc("POST", "/rpc/users.updateUser", input),

  /**
   * Get all posts by a user
   * GET /rpc/users.getPosts
   */
  getPosts: (userId: string): Promise<RpcResult<Post[], GetPostsErrorDetail>> =>
    rpc("GET", "/rpc/users.getPosts", { userId }),
};

export const posts = {
  /**
   * Create a new post
   * POST /rpc/posts.createPost
   */
  createPost: (
    input: CreatePostRequest,
  ): Promise<RpcResult<Post, CreatePostErrorDetail>> =>
    rpc("POST", "/rpc/posts.createPost", input),
};
```

## `@teleport-rs/client` — The `rpc` Function

```typescript
// @teleport-rs/client/src/rpc.ts

export interface RpcConfig {
  baseUrl: string;
  timeout?: number;
  headers?: () => Record<string, string> | Promise<Record<string, string>>;
  credentials?: RequestCredentials;
}

export type HttpMethod = "GET" | "POST";

let config: RpcConfig = {
  baseUrl: "/rpc",
  timeout: 30000,
  credentials: "include", // forward cookies by default
};

export function configure(opts: Partial<RpcConfig>): void {
  config = { ...config, ...opts };
}

import qs from "qs";

export async function rpc<T, E>(
  method: HttpMethod,
  path: string,
  input: unknown,
): Promise<RpcResult<T, E>> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), config.timeout);

  try {
    const headers: Record<string, string> = {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      ...(config.headers ? await config.headers() : {}),
    };

    const init: RequestInit = {
      method,
      headers,
      credentials: config.credentials,
      signal: controller.signal,
    };

    if (method === "GET" && input) {
      // For GET requests, encode input as query params using qs
      // qs supports nested objects and arrays (e.g., filters[status]=active&tags[0]=foo)
      const queryString = qs.stringify(input, { skipNulls: true });
      if (queryString) path = `${path}?${queryString}`;
    } else if (method === "POST" && input !== undefined) {
      init.body = JSON.stringify(input);
    }

    const response = await fetch(`${config.baseUrl}${path}`, init);

    clearTimeout(timeoutId);

    if (!response.ok) {
      // Try to parse as AppError
      try {
        const errorBody = await response.json();
        return { ok: false, error: errorBody as AppError<E> };
      } catch {
        // Response body is not valid JSON
        return {
          ok: false,
          transport: {
            type: "ServerError",
            status: response.status,
            body: await response.text(),
          },
        };
      }
    }

    // Success — parse response body
    const data = (await response.json()) as T;
    return { ok: true, data };
  } catch (err) {
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);

    if (err instanceof DOMException && err.name === "AbortError") {
      return {
        ok: false,
        transport: {
          type: "Timeout",
          message: `Request timed out after ${config.timeout}ms`,
        },
      };
    }

    if (err instanceof TypeError && err.message.includes("fetch")) {
      return {
        ok: false,
        transport: { type: "NetworkError", message: err.message },
      };
    }

    return {
      ok: false,
      transport: { type: "NetworkError", message: String(err) },
    };
  }
}
```

## SvelteKit Integration — Handwritten `data.remote.ts`

The generated client is used inside SvelteKit remote functions. The `.remote.ts` files are **handwritten**, not auto-generated:

```typescript
// src/lib/server/data.remote.ts

import { query, command, form } from "$app/server";
import { z } from "zod";
import { auth, users, posts } from "$lib/api/generated/client";

export const getVersion = query(async () => {
  const result = await auth.getVersion();
  if (!result.ok) throw new Error("Failed to get version");
  return result.data;
});

export const getUser = query(z.string(), async (id) => {
  const result = await users.getUser(id);
  if (!result.ok) {
    if ("transport" in result) throw new Error(result.transport.message);
    if (result.error.type === "NotFound") throw new Error("User not found");
    throw new Error(result.error.type);
  }
  return result.data;
});

export const login = command(
  z.object({ email: z.string(), password: z.string() }),
  async (input) => {
    const result = await auth.login(input);
    if (!result.ok) {
      if ("transport" in result) throw new Error(result.transport.message);
      // Handle specific login errors
      if (result.error.type === "Detail") {
        if (result.error.detail.invalidCredentials) {
          throw new Error("Invalid email or password");
        }
        if (result.error.detail.accountLocked) {
          throw new Error("Account is locked");
        }
      }
      throw new Error("Login failed");
    }
    return result.data;
  },
);

export const createPost = form(async (formData: FormData) => {
  const input = {
    title: formData.get("title") as string,
    content: formData.get("content") as string,
    tags: (formData.get("tags") as string).split(","),
  };
  const result = await posts.createPost(input);
  if (!result.ok) throw new Error("Failed to create post");
  return result.data;
});
```

## Configuration

The SvelteKit app initializes the teleport-rs client:

```typescript
// src/lib/api/config.ts

import { configure } from "@teleport-rs/client";

configure({
  baseUrl: import.meta.env.VITE_RPC_URL || "http://localhost:3000/rpc",
  timeout: 10000,
  credentials: "include", // forward cookies
  headers: async () => {
    // Optional: add auth headers
    return {};
  },
});
```

## Re-exports Barrel

```typescript
// src/lib/api/index.ts

export * from "./generated/types";
export * from "./generated/errors";
export { auth, users, posts } from "./generated/client";
export { configure, type RpcConfig, type RpcResult } from "@teleport-rs/client";
export { isTransportError, isAppError, unwrap } from "@teleport-rs/client";
```
